serviceNotes.engine oil: N57 six-cylinder diesel; CBS MFR 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum oil service (SIB B000214 / service display).
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 90,000 km: air filter every third engine oil service (3 × 30,000 km).
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Changed from 60,000 km to 90,000 km: fuel filter every third engine oil service per E90 CBS schedule (garage.wiki E90 2008 service intervals).
serviceNotes.timing chain: Chain-driven; monitor at very high mileage.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Turbo diesel cooling circuit: preventive ~120,000 km.
serviceNotes.EGR / intake clean: Six-cylinder diesel EGR/intake soot. Workshop cleaning around ~120,000 km where drivability issues appear.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals) — 30,000 km / 24 months EU maximum. https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html
serviceSources.air cleaner element: Changed from 60,000 km to 90,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html — air filter each third engine oil change
serviceSources.fuel filter: Changed from 60,000 km to 90,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/fifth-generation-e90/2008/service-intervals.html — fuel filter each third engine oil change (supersedes https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2245-2009/service 45,000 km static row)
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS); 30,000 km planning
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS); 30,000 km planning
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — every second oil service (60,000 km)
serviceSources.timing chain: No fixed N57 chain replacement km in consumer CBS table — REC
serviceSources.coolant flush: BMW owner's manual E90 diesel; REC ~120,000 km
serviceSources.EGR / intake clean: Diesel workshop consensus; not fixed OEM MFR km
